summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JWT authentication system and farm management features. All authentication flows working correctly with 90.7% backend API success rate and 100% frontend functionality.

minor_cleanup_issues.issue: Some cleanup operations failed with 404 errors
minor_cleanup_issues.impact: No functional impact - records were already deleted

minor_ui_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@fazenda.com / admin123)
Login page renders with email and password fields
Sidebar navigation shows all menu items
Usuarios menu item visible only for admin users
User creation, listing, and deletion functionality
Logout functionality returns to login page
All existing farm features accessible (animais, movimentacoes, eventos, despesas, relatorios)
Invalid login properly rejected with 401 status
PDF and Excel report generation working
All CRUD operations for farm entities working
